site.name: MagaruLaw
site.tagline: Digital Home of the Avar People
site.description: Culture, history and language of the Avar people of Dagestan

home.description: An independent platform bringing together the language, history and cultural heritage of the ancient Avar people of Dagestan.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Avar Cultural Platform
about.intro: MagaruLaw is an independent digital platform established to preserve and promote the culture, language and history of the Avar people of Dagestan.
about.mission: To unite the globally dispersed Avar diaspora under one digital roof, support the learning and preservation of the Avar language, and deliver current news from Dagestan in Turkish, English and Avar.
about.people: The Avars (Авар, МагӀарулал) are the largest ethnic group in the Republic of Dagestan. With a population of approximately 1 million, they are one of the largest peoples of the North Caucasus.
about.contribute: This platform grows with community contributions. If you would like to become an author, add words to the dictionary, or share photographs, please get in touch.

lessons.title: Avar Language Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Авар мацӀ — Learn Avar step by step
